headline: BASFY Unveils Oppanol N PLUS for Next-Generation EV Batteries
summary: BASF SE unveils Oppanol N PLUS, a binder for next-gen EV and solid-state batteries aimed at boosting durability, safety and manufacturing efficiency.

headline: Air Liquide Invests EUR 200M to Support SK hynix AI Memory Expansion
summary: AIQUY will invest nearly EUR 200M in South Korea under a long-term SK hynix deal to support next-generation HBM chip production for AI infrastructure.

raw.headline: Air Liquide Invests EUR 200M to Support SK hynix AI Memory Expansion
raw.summary: AIQUY will invest nearly EUR 200M in South Korea under a long-term SK hynix deal to support next-generation HBM chip production for AI infrastructure.

headline: Nucor Announces 213th Consecutive Cash Dividend
summary: The Board of Directors of Nucor Corporation (NYSE: NUE) declared the regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.56 per share on Nucor's common stock. This cash dividend is payable on August 11, 2026 to stockholders of record on June 30, 2026 and is Nucor's 213th consecutive quarterly cash dividend.

raw.headline: Nucor Announces 213th Consecutive Cash Dividend

headline: Nucor Stock: Is NUE Outperforming the Materials Sector?
summary: Nucor has outperformed the broader materials sector over the past year, and analysts are very bullish about its future outlook.
